zh.of Mabelfyw, Cantref Mawr, Carmarthenshi: 英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾
zh.Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom: 英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾
zh.of, Bodedern, Anglesey, Wales: 英國威爾斯安格萊波迪德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel ap Iorwerth Ddu於大約1330年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾時，他的父親Iorwerth Ddu ap Iorwerth32歲，母親Gwenillian verch Maredudd11歲。他於1369年與Angharad verch Hywel ap Cynwrig Vychan在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.of Mabelfyw, Cantref Mawr, Carmarthenshi: 英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾
zh-hans.Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom: 英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾
zh-hans.of, Bodedern, Anglesey, Wales: 英国威尔斯安格萊波迪德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel ap Iorwerth Ddu于大约1330年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾时，他的父亲Iorwerth Ddu ap Iorwerth32岁，母亲Gwenillian verch Maredudd11岁。他于1369年与Angharad verch Hywel ap Cynwrig Vychan在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: Ddu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: West African (Nigeria): from the Yoruba personal name Adú, originally a nickname from a dú ‘that has a very dark complexion’.
West African (Ghana): from an Akan male personal name of unexplained etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Iorwerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel ap Iorwerth Ddu was born about 1330, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Iorwerth Ddu ap Iorwerth, was 32 and his mother, Gwenillian verch Maredudd, was 11. He married Angharad verch Hywel ap Cynwrig Vychan in 1369, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.of, Bodedern, Anglesey, Wales: Bodedern, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel ap Iorwerth Ddu est né environ 1330, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Iorwerth Ddu ap Iorwerth, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Gwenillian verch Maredudd, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Angharad verch Hywel ap Cynwrig Vychan en 1369, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel ap Iorwerth Ddu um 1330 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Iorwerth Ddu ap Iorwerth 32 und seine Mutter Gwenillian verch Maredudd 11. Er hat 1369 in Wales, United Kingdom Angharad verch Hywel ap Cynwrig Vychan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ap Iorwerth Ddu è nato il circa 1330 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Iorwerth Ddu ap Iorwerth, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Gwenillian verch Maredudd, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Angharad verch Hywel ap Cynwrig Vychan nel 1369, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.of Mabelfyw, Cantref Mawr, Carmarthenshi: イギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイア
ja.Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom: イギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイア
ja.Pentraeth, Anglesey, Wales: ウェールズアングレセイペントラエス
ja.of, Bodedern, Anglesey, Wales: イギリスウェールズアングレセイボデデルン
ja.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Iorwerth Dduが約1330年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Iorwerth Ddu ap Iorwerthは32歳，母Gwenillian verch Mareduddは11歳であった。1369年にイギリスウェールズでAngharad verch Hywel ap Cynwrig Vychanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Iorwerth Ddu(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Iorwerth Ddu ap Iorwerth(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenillian verch Maredudd(은)는 11세였다. 그는 1369년 영국 웨일스에서 Angharad verch Hywel ap Cynwrig Vychan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ap Iorwerth Ddu nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Iorwerth Ddu ap Iorwerth, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Gwenillian verch Maredudd, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Angharad verch Hywel ap Cynwrig Vychan em 1369, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em Gales, United Kingdom.

ro.of, Bodedern, Anglesey, Wales: Bodedern, Anglesey, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel ap Iorwerth Ddu родился около 1330 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Iorwerth Ddu ap Iorwerth было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenillian verch Maredudd, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Angharad verch Hywel ap Cynwrig Vychan в 1369 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel ap Iorwerth Ddu nació aproximadamente 1330, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Iorwerth Ddu ap Iorwerth, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Gwenillian verch Maredudd, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Angharad verch Hywel ap Cynwrig Vychan en 1369, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en Gales, Reino Unido.
